<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Argument\Search\SchemaFields; class GeoField extends AbstractField { /** * @param string $identifier * @param string $alias * @param bool|string $sortable * @param bool $noIndex * @param bool $allowsMissing */ public function __construct( string $identifier, string $alias = '', $sortable = self::NOT_SORTABLE, bool $noIndex = false, bool $allowsMissing = false ) { $this->setCommonOptions('GEO', $identifier, $alias, $sortable, $noIndex, $allowsMissing); } }
